## Summary

Describe the change and the reason for it.

## Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Chore

## Scope

- [ ] backend
- [ ] frontend
- [ ] docker
- [ ] docs
- [ ] config
- [ ] github / collaboration

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated related documentation when behavior, setup, or structure changed
- [ ] I checked whether screenshots, examples, roadmap, or docs navigation also need updates
- [ ] I called out any breaking behavior, migration step, or contributor-facing impact below

## Validation

- [ ] Relevant backend tests passed
- [ ] Frontend type check passed
- [ ] Frontend unit tests passed
- [ ] Frontend lint passed
- [ ] Docker-related changes were validated locally if applicable

## Risks

Describe behavior changes, migration risks, or edge cases.

## Documentation Impact

- [ ] No documentation impact
- [ ] README / docs navigation updated
- [ ] Historical docs or plans were reorganized
- [ ] Screenshots / examples updated

## Deployment Notes

- [ ] No special deployment steps
- [ ] New environment variables
- [ ] Schema or data migration required
- [ ] Rebuild Docker images required

## Screenshots or API Examples

Provide UI screenshots or request/response samples when relevant.
